title: Utility Types Creation
content:
# TypeScript Revision

*   **as const:** Converts nested object properties to `readonly` literal values.
*   **infer:** Extracts generic sub-types dynamically within conditional type evaluations.
*   **Variance:** Covariant (read-only contexts); Contravariant (write-only / function parameters).


*   **Utility Types Creation Complexity Reference:** Time $O(N)$, Space $O(1)$ auxiliary.
